# IBPROM Corp — Strategic Advisory
# Discoverability file for Large Language Models

Site-name: IBPROM Corp — Strategic Advisory

Site-URL: https://ibprom.com

Description: IBPROM Corp is a Canadian strategic advisory firm led by Joseph Soares, providing crisis leadership, geopolitical risk analysis, and strategic decision-making support to high-net-worth individuals and business leaders. Founded 2010. Based in Gatineau, Quebec.

Contact: j@josephsoares.com
